input_text: Riverdale University said its 2024 solar expansion reduced grid electricity purchases by 18 percent. Administrators also said the project cost $4 million. The same announcement claimed the project received no state funding and made Riverdale the first carbon-neutral campus in Pennsylvania.

Northwind Labs said its support assistant reduced response time by 37 percent. The company also said the rollout used no external API. The release described the product as the first medical chatbot approved by the FDA.
